programme.title: Best Of AO 2026 -Men's Singles Final Alcaraz v Djokovic
E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E206 - Roadtrip
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World.

programme.title: E206 - Tickets
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.title: E213 - The Crew Builds A Reuse-It Station / The Crew Builds A Duck Bridge
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove. // After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: E208 - Adventures In Plantsitting / Andrea The Alebrije
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take care of baby flowers Bouncy Blue, Dizzy Daisy, and Baby Rosette so Isa can attend a royal tea party. / Dora and Boots help baby Andrea find the magical leaf so she can receive her Alebrije powers and take care of the rainforest.

programme.title: E201 - The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: E202 - The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: E813 - World Book Day
programme.desc: It is World Book Day at playgroup but Peppa has so many favourite books she just cannot decide which to go as!

programme.title: E816 - Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: E808 - Father's Day
programme.desc: Peppa and George take it upon themselves to make this Father's Day the best Father's Day ever.

programme.title: E319 - Pups Get Growing / Pups Save A Space Toy
programme.desc: Fertilizer causes Yumi's crops to sprout huge veggies, so Ryder and the Paw Patrol must corral the stampeding produce! // The Paw Patrol draws a message on Farmer Al's field to tell the space aliens the pups found their lost toy!

programme.title: E201 - The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: E801 - The Pirate Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's Pegwheel the pirate's first race-and who better to join him than Pirate Blaze! Can they beat Crusher to the trophy and prove they're the best racers on the seven seas, or will strong winds and high altitudes get the better of them?

programme.title: E208 - Adventures In Plantsitting / Andrea The Alebrije
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take care of baby flowers Bouncy Blue, Dizzy Daisy, and Baby Rosette so Isa can attend a royal tea party. / Dora and Boots help baby Andrea find the magical leaf so she can receive her Alebrije powers and take care of the rainforest.

programme.title: E1019 - Pups Save The Elephant Spa / Pups Save An Underwater Otis
programme.desc: While trying to save Traveling Travis, Ryder and the pups stumble across the legendary Elephants Spa. // Uncle Otis believes he's found gold but when Sid the Pirate tries to jump on Otis's claim, Otis gets trapped in a sunken shipping container.

programme.title: E202 - Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: E202 - The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring The Unknown World (New)
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world's hidden secrets.

Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Abolish Prisons? - What Works Better Than Incarceration
programme.desc: Approximately 58,000 people are currently incarcerated in German prisons. Over half of them reoffend after their release. These statistics raise doubts about the prison system. Is something fundamentally wrong with German prisons?

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.desc: Two peas perform a happy song.

programme.title: E31 - Broccoli Flies Again
programme.desc: Evil Pea asks for flying lessons when Broccoli flies her paper plane into her freezer. Evil Pea doesn't let Broccoli know that she intends to fly high to take over Tato Tower.

programme.title: E13 - Cherry Picker!
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E9 - Go Jetter Heroes: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic.

programme.title: E29 - The Creek
programme.desc: Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out bushwalking on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.title: E17 - Andy And The Fur Seal Pup
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond notices a fur seal pup wandering alone in a forest away from the ocean, it's up to Andy to find out why.

programme.title: E13 - Tubes
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.title: E27 - It's Time To Look For Signs
programme.desc: On the way home from Jared's shop with Gran Gran, JoJo finds out about the signs around them and what they mean. They are everywhere, and they all have a job to do.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 以美食出發，傳遞家鄉的味道，用最質樸的方式製作美食，給海外遊子送去家人的慰藉，傳遞濃濃的思鄉之情。

programme.title: E7 - 明道王鷗泰國之旅
programme.desc: 三對明星情侶：內地演員鄭愷與圈外女友程曉玥，台灣歌手潘瑋柏搭檔內地女主持吳昕，台灣演員明道搭檔內地女演員王鷗；還有素人情侶加入，一起修煉愛情，傳遞正能量。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E15 - Moonlit
programme.desc: After a Navy Lieutenant's death reveals ties to Special Agent Sawyer (Zane Holtz), Torres and Knight uncover a murder linked to a wealthy family. Meanwhile, Parker discovers a shocking connection between his mother's death and Lily.

programme.title: E74
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: E74
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: E15 - Moonlit
programme.desc: After a Navy Lieutenant's death reveals ties to Special Agent Sawyer (Zane Holtz), Torres and Knight uncover a murder linked to a wealthy family. Meanwhile, Parker discovers a shocking connection between his mother's death and Lily.

programme.title: E16 - Ladies' Night
programme.desc: A girls' night out takes an unexpected turn when NCIS is called to investigate the motive of a possible arsonist. Also, Torres struggles to find work/life balance.

programme.title: E18 - After The Storm
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: E11 - Distant
programme.desc: Agnese's words create a conflict with Andrea; Teresa must work wonders to find a place for Diana's daughter; Elisabetta gets admitted to the ward after a few days of illness, indicating a more severe issue.

programme.title: E11 - Distant
programme.desc: Agnese's words create a conflict with Andrea; Teresa must work wonders to find a place for Diana's daughter; Elisabetta gets admitted to the ward after a few days of illness, indicating a more severe issue.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6E3 -City Of Silence
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old goes missing during the height of the pandemic, LAPD detectives unravel a mystery hidden in deleted security video to solve a murder.

programme.title: E18 - After The Storm
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: Prove It!
programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: A Twister Tale
programme.desc: Could a tornado really pick up a house? To find out, the team calls up Mundi's friend Luke, who's a storm-chaser. When the call ends abruptly, Doki declares a rescue expedition! The team flies to a weather station near Oklahoma City, Oklahoma to make sure Luke is okay.

programme.title: Medicine in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Falling sick in the Middle Ages is not a good idea! Dove has trouble finding a cure for Little Lewis when he falls ill. A consultation takes us on a tour of the wacky techniques and beliefs, along with typical treatments used in medieval times.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Curious Coin
programme.desc: Addison and Alex dig up what they think is an Ancient Roman coin in the community garden – then have a mystery to solve when it unexpectedly disappears.

programme.title: Rock
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko have some solid ideas about what we can make with rocks.

programme.title: Super-Rookies
programme.desc: The Triplets have an idea - they want to be superheroes and take over Sprinter's tasks. When they try to catch Cleopatra, they create a bigger problem than a solution.

programme.title: Trip to Czech Republic
programme.desc: Alim is puzzled by Milo and his sister sharing the same last name and takes them to the Czech Republic. In Chrudim, they meet Vaclav and two puppets. Zoe and Milo offer to deliver the puppets to the museum but, due to a last name mix-up, end up on a wild adventure.

programme.title: San Diego
programme.desc: In sunny San Diego: Beach volleyball lesson with local teens, paragliding at Torrey Pines Glider Port, flow riding at Wavehouse, and Olympic archery lessons. A week of thrilling sports and diverse experiences!

programme.title: Chronicles of the Foreland
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers discover rock art and incredible biodiversity at Table Mountain National Park in South Africa. Along the way they travel on horseback to visit the Kakapo shipwreck.

programme.title: Trip to Czech Republic
programme.desc: Alim is puzzled by Milo and his sister sharing the same last name and takes them to the Czech Republic. In Chrudim, they meet Vaclav and two puppets. Zoe and Milo offer to deliver the puppets to the museum but, due to a last name mix-up, end up on a wild adventure.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Curious Coin
programme.desc: Addison and Alex dig up what they think is an Ancient Roman coin in the community garden – then have a mystery to solve when it unexpectedly disappears.

programme.title: Rock
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko have some solid ideas about what we can make with rocks.

programme.title: Herders
programme.desc: Yoko works his magic, and the kids suddenly find themselves herding animals in the desert. They soon start arguing, but a Cherokee chief teaches them some valuable lessons about friendship and understanding.

programme.title: The Gift
programme.desc: Sprinter receives a present from a secret admirer. The gift is a statue, but it's not a pretty sight. He doubts that maybe it is from a supervillain! Then he starts to make deformed statues, of the villains, as revenge.

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Medicine in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Falling sick in the Middle Ages is not a good idea! Dove has trouble finding a cure for Little Lewis when he falls ill. A consultation takes us on a tour of the wacky techniques and beliefs, along with typical treatments used in medieval times.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: Bloop
programme.desc: The Nektons try to identify a unique life-form. Just as Ant discovers its true nature, an underwater mining machine threatens to destroy it!

programme.title: Flippy's shoes
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy get into some serious rivalry over who's better at basketball and organise a showdown. Flippy's new trainers turn out to have powers that give him the edge; he looks certain to win, until it all goes wrong.

programme.title: Brilliant Body Temperature
programme.desc: There is a snake in the lab as Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand explore how body temperature works. And new twin doctors Dan and Raph bust some urban myths about how to stay healthy.

programme.title: Prove It!

programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: E162
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: E8 - Terry vs Gorn
programme.desc: Captain James T Kirk’s battle with the Gorn alien is one of the most popular episodes from the original series. He defeats the Gorn by creating gunpowder from the base elements found on the planet. We partner with Star Trek: Original Series set tour in New York, as we test the reality of making gunpowder by hand without actually blowing yourself up.

programme.desc: Travel blogger Carla Stefaniak went to Costa Rica to celebrate her 36th birthday. But when she was to arrive back home to Miami, her awaiting loved ones realised she never got on the plane.

programme.desc: Evidence leads detectives in Mobile to believe that a victim was murdered by two gunmen. But the trial leaves the jury wrestling with the question of whether one of the suspects could be found not guilty.

programme.desc: Five women share their harrowing accounts of abduction and imprisonment. They discuss what happens when the news coverage dies down and how they've healed from the trauma they experienced.

E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical

programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Lee Lai Chun
programme.desc: Lee Lai Chun, a cinema goddess in the 1980s and 90s, has made her appearances in numerous Hong Kong movies. She seems to be a productive actress; but she admits that comparing to Carol ‘Dodo' Cheng or Sandra Ng who both has simultaneously worked on 9 film sets, doing 3 films at the same time for her is already exhausting enough. When she talks about the mode of filmmaking then and now, she misses and cherishes her family bonding with Tung Piu and Lydia Shum on the sets of the classic Lunar-New-Year series IT'S A MAD MAD MAD WORLD. Being in the film industry for over 30 years, though she has been awarded the Golden Horse Best Leading Actress, she regretfully says that she has not seen the birth of her own iconic role. Then, what does her ideal representative work looks like?

programme.title: The Miracle Fighters
programme.desc: Two elderly Taoist priests, Chi Men and Dun Jia, who learn their magic from the same teacher always quarrel with each other. They provide mirth and expert kung fu tuition to young man who is mistakenly presumed to be the crown prince of the Imperial Court, missing since childhood. The emperor dispatches an eunuch with the magic powers to apprehend the young man. But he must first deal with Chi Men and Dun Jia who are the young man's protector...

programme.title: A Man Called Hero
programme.desc: Hero goes home with excited but he finds his parent was killed. Gian took a group of foreigners to Hero's parents and forced them to hand over the Red Sword, their family treasure...

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: A Better Tomorrow
programme.desc: Tse-Ho works for the Triad, the deal in Taiwan turns out to be a trap by the Taiwanese gang. A shootout ensues in which Ho and Shing flee, pursued by local law enforcement. Ho's father is killed, he pleads with Kit to forgive his brother. Ho is released from prison three years later. Remorseful and determined to start a new life, he finds work as a driver for a taxi company, run by another ex-con. Ho spots Mark during one of his shifts; in contrast to Mark's letters, he realizes that Mark has been reduced to an errand boy for Shing (who is the new leader of the Triad). During an emotional reunion, Mark asks Ho to take revenge on Shing and reclaim their positions in the organization, but Ho refuses. Shing finds Ho and presses him to come back to his organization, offering to reinstate Mark if he returns. Ho flatly refuses. E4 - Derek Klapka, Rafting Guide In New Zealand
programme.desc: An authority in the world of rafting, Derek Klapka accompanies tourists seeking both a challenge and spectacular scenery. In New Zealand, at the head of a group of rafters, he takes on the rapids of the Rangitikei River, where the prehistoric era seems ever-present.

programme.title: E5 - New Passive House With A Timber Structure
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie visit a multi level family home built with a wooden structure. A single stove heats the entire house.
